screens.title: Approved Catalog Management
screens.prompt: Mobile Approved Catalog management screen for agents. Style: Bold Editorial from {{DATA:SCREEN:SCREEN_10}}. Hebrew RTL only. Layout: 1. TopAppBar (title: 'ניהול קטלוג מאושר'). 2. Summary/Error Banner at top (red background for conflict/error, Hebrew text). 3. List of Approved Items: Cards with item name (e.g., 'אנטריקוט פרימיום'), SKU, price per unit, and a 'Quantity' input field. 4. 'Add New Item' section: Input for SKU/Name and a '+' button. 5. Sticky Bottom Action: Primary CTA button ('בצע הזמנה' or 'עדכן קטלו'), price total, and BottomNavBar. Visuals: Deep red (#7A1F1B) and steel teal accents, tactile rounded cards (ROUND_TWELVE), high-contrast typography. Use placeholder images for meat products. Add motion notes: staggered list reveal, focus glow on quantity inputs.
screens.name: projects/11487176842394258097/screens/a957b2c6927a46c0b36cde1e012bf267

theme.designMd:
# Meatland Full Product Design System

## Core Tone
Premium butcher-craft meets fast operational logistics. Avoid generic SaaS look.

## Color Story
- Primary: deep cured red for authority and trust.
- Secondary: cold steel teal for data and controls.
- Accent: warm copper for key highlights and progress moments.
- Surfaces: layered warm neutrals, no flat sterile white-only canvases.

## Typography and RTL
- Hebrew-first, RTL-first visual hierarchy.
- Large headline rhythm, compact utilitarian body labels.
- High contrast, generous whitespace, dense information only where needed.

## Motion Choreography (required)
- Page entry: 320ms stagger reveal (title, context chips, cards).
- Stateful transitions: 180-220ms for tab/filter/chip transitions.
- Network feedback: skeleton shimmer + subtle pulse, never blank states.
- Success moments: short celebratory rise/fade 420ms.
- Respect reduced motion settings.

## Layout Rules
- Use layered cards with tonal depth and soft shadows.
- Sticky action rails on mobile where submit/share actions are critical.
- Strong visual grouping by background planes, not heavy borders.

## Shadcn Usage (customer portal)
Use shadcn primitives and patterns for all portal screens:
- Card, Button, Input, Label, Badge, Separator, Skeleton, Dialog, Sheet, ScrollArea, Tabs, Toast, Table.
- Use semantic table structure for order line summaries.
- Prefer shadcn blocks for login/order dashboard style layout composition.

## Mobile App Interaction Language
- Bottom tab shell with clear active pill.
- Agent dashboard cards with progressive disclosure.
- Swipe and press states must feel tactile and fast.
- WhatsApp send action must be prominent with fallback copy-link path.

## Anti-patterns
- No emoji icons.
- No purple default UI aesthetic.
- No excessive motion on every element.
- No low-contrast glass cards on light backgrounds.

outputComponents.text:
I've created the **Approved Catalog Management** screen for the mobile sales app. 

Key features:
- **Bold Editorial Style:** Matches the typographic and visual hierarchy of the login screen, utilizing the deep red and steel teal palette.
- **Full Hebrew RTL:** All text, layouts, and component directions are localized for Hebrew users.
- **Catalog Management:** Includes a detailed list of approved meat items with SKU details, pricing, and quantity adjustments.
- **Operational Clarity:** Features a prominent system alert banner for stock conflicts and a clear "Add to Catalog" input section.
- **Interactive Elements:** Designed with tactile cards and clear primary actions, including a "Execute Purchase" sticky button.
- **Motion Strategy:** I've included notes for staggered list animations and focus states to enhance the premium feel.

outputComponents.suggestion: Add a search filter to the catalog
Create a success state for submitted orders
